zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Boteler於1451年10月出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾貝福 霍爾時，她的父親Sir John Boteler22歲，母親Margaret Gerard18歲。她與Geffrey Massey在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年在她的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Boteler于1451年10月出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾貝福 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir John Boteler22岁，母亲Margaret Gerard18岁。她与Geffrey Massey在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年在她的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Boteler was born in October 1451, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Boteler, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Gerard, was 18. She married Geffrey Massey in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1495, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Boteler est née en octobre 1451, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Boteler, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gerard, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Geffrey Massey à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Botelerが1451年10月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir John Botelerは22歳，母Margaret Gerardは18歳であった。イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでGeffrey Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Boteler(이)가 1451년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Boteler(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Gerard(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Geffrey Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Geffrey Massey em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Boteler родилась октябрь 1451 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Boteler было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gerard, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geffrey Massey в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1495 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
